name: Stop Pat Toomey
subject: Race Update: "most likely to flip"
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7191157769116844032/-5151531934014242816?refcode=e20160505&refcode2=e20160505nd&amount=10)
---
_NPR_ : Pennsylvania Senate among top five seats "most likely to flip control"
**[Take back the Senate for Democrats: Contribute $5 now>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7191157769116844032/-5151531934014242816?refcode=e20160505&refcode2=e20160505nd&amount=10)**

Friend --

Just days ago, _NPR_ ranked **Pat Toomey 's Senate seat among the top five "most likely to flip parties"** this year.

And they're in good company. The _Washington Post, The Hill,_ and the _National Journal_ have all ranked our race as one of the most likely to flip from Republican to Democratic control in November.

But here's the thing: Toomey and his special interest allies are seeing these same headlines, and they're responding by **spending six figures on the airwaves to attack Katie and distort Toomey 's record.** _And that 's just during the first week of the general election..._

**Democrats ' path to winning back the Senate majority goes straight through Pennsylvania. [Make an urgent $5 donation to fight back and help Katie turn the Senate back to blue.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7191157769116844032/-5151531934014242816?refcode=e20160505&refcode2=e20160505nd&amount=10)**

Thank you,

Stop Pat Toomey
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7191157769116844032/-5151531934014242816?refcode=e20160505&refcode2=e20160505nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---

name: John Kasich
subject: Thank you
body:
Your devotion to our campaign based on our shared belief in
solving our nation's challenges by uniting people and lifting
them up will forever remain in the hearts of my family and me.

Together, we fought the good
fight and did it the right way. Your devotion to our campaign
based on our shared belief in solving our nation's challenges by
uniting people and lifting them up will forever remain in the
hearts of my family and me. While our campaign is ending, our
work is not over. We need to continue strengthening our families
and our communities because that is how we strengthen our
country.

From the bottom of my heart,
thank you.

John Kasich

P.S. You can watch my remarks
from yesterday's event (here).

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

You were added to the system July 18, 2015.

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: For the record:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Don't wait another minute | Friend --

For the last year, I've been hearing from supporters all across the country: "I'm on Hillary's side, I'm just waiting for the general election to step up and give."

(For the record, we’ve needed grassroots supporters from day one in order to win the nomination -- and more than 1.2 million people have stepped up to be a part of this campaign. But, that’s besides the point.)

The time is now. It's mathematically impossible for Bernie to win the nomination with pledged delegates, and Donald Trump is the last Republican standing.

You can't wait another minute. Preparing for the general election begins today -- we have to stop Trump and make sure our next president is a woman who will fight to break down barriers for every family.

**Right now, we're kicking off our Stop Trump Fund. Be one of the first to chip in and say you're ready to win the White House this November:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0MTExMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzg0MzcxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0MTExMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzg0MzcxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Dennis

Dennis Cheng
National Finance Director
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU0MTExMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzg0MzcxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU0MTExMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzg0MzcxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU0MTExMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzg0MzcxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU0MTExMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzg0MzcxS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU0MTExMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzg0MzcxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU0MTExMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzg0MzcxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU0MTExMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzg0MzcxS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU0MTExMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzg0MzcxS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU0MTExMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzg0MzcxS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU0MTExMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzg0MzcxS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU0MTExMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzg0MzcxS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU0MTExMzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNzg0MzcxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Bob Fertik, Democrats.com
subject: Lebron James and Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect Alan Grayson
body:
| | | [](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00124701MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-05-05)
---|---|---
| Dear Activist, [](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00124702MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-05-05)**[I think that LeBron James should pay the same percentage of his income in Social Security taxes as everyone else does.](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00124703MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-05-05)**

He doesn't. Not by a long shot. In fact, not by a 90-footer.

Most Americans pay 6.20% of their incomes to Social Security taxes. LeBron James pays 0.03% of his income toward Social Security taxes. In fact, he is finished paying his Social Security taxes in the second quarter of his first game of his season. Then he's done for the rest of the game, and the rest of the season - including the playoffs. Even the offseason.

"Wow," you say. Yes, "wow" indeed.

I want to make this clear - this is nothing personal. I love to watch LeBron James play basketball. I forgive him for taking his talents to South Beach, but then taking them right back to Cleveland. I look forward to his becoming the all-time NBA scoring champion, during the 2021-22 season.

[**But I think that he should have to pay the same percentage in Social Security taxes as others do.**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00124704MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-05-05)

The Social Security tax applies only to the first $118,500 of income (the "cap"). As soon as LeBron and anyone else reaches that limit, they're done for the year.

Which is precisely why some people fret about the system going broke. The solution is obvious. No cap, no problem. In addition to making our tax system more fair, scrapping the cap would make Social Security solvent forever and ever. And ever. So I have introduced a bill to do that, and the Social Security Administration has confirmed that it solves the problem once and for all. Sure, some Republicans would be sad -- they'd have no excuse to push sadistic cuts in Social Security benefits. But the rest of us would be thrilled.

[**I have introduced the Grayson bill to "scrap the cap." Add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor now to help make sure YOUR Social Security will be there for you, no matter how long you live >>**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00124705MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-05-05)

Q. When does a teacher stop paying Social Security taxes? A. Never.

Q. When does a nurse stop paying Social Security taxes? A. Never.

Q. Why do only the rich get this huge tax break, threatening the solvency of the program? A. I wish I knew.

[**Help me make Social Security solvent forever and ever by becoming a citizen co-sponsor of my "scrap the cap" bill now >>**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00124706MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-05-05)

Courage,

Alan Grayson

_"Cleveland, city of light, city of magic._
_Cleveland, city of light, you're calling me._
_Cleveland, even now, I can remember._
_'Cause the Cuyahoga River_
_Goes smoking through my dreams._
_Burn on, big river, burn on._
_Burn on, big river, burn on!"_

_\- Randy Newman, "Burn On, Big River" (1972)._
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00124707MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-05-05)**
---
Paid for by the Committee to Elect Alan Grayson

* * *
Democrats.com is the oldest online community of progressive activists, with over 3 million
supporters. We fight for jobs, justice, healthcare, education, the environment, and peace.
We're supported by great progressive partners so we never ask for donations.
Please join us at **[Democrats.com](http://democrats.com)**! You are subscriber #10036727 to Democrats.com Activist Alerts.
[Click here](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=L45) if you do not want future messages from Alan Grayson.
If you do not want messages from any of our partners [click here](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=noads).
[Click here](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=L1) to permanently unsubscribe from all Democrats.com lists.

name: Christian Pancake
subject: The only choice for Ohio students
body:
| Peter --

While Ted Strickland likes to tour college campuses and pose for photo ops, the fact is while he was governor, Ohio lost more than 350,000 jobs and ranked 48th in job creation.

Ted Strickland cut funding for colleges and universities by $170 million in addition to cutting funding for preschools, literacy programs, school bus purchases, the Early Learning Initiative, and the School for the Deaf and the School for the Blind.

[](https://www.robportman.com/shredded?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=budget_outreach&n=1)
College students want jobs -- and that's what left our state on Ted Strickland's watch. One thing is clear: students can’t afford to go back to Retread Ted’s Ohio. Watch the Portman campaign's new web ad, "[Shredded](https://www.robportman.com/shredded?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=budget_outreach&n=2)," to learn more about Ted Strickland's budget cuts.

Rob Portman is the only one in this race who is truly looking out for Ohio students by working to expand access to college and make it more affordable. Rob is fighting for the Repay Act, legislation that helps college students - like myself - with student loan consolidation and practical repayment options. I am proud to be one of Rob’s 30 college campus co-chairs and eager to continue spreading Rob’s message and pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs. We're working hard to make sure that we send Rob back to the Senate -- [you can sign up to volunteer by clicking here.](http://www.robportman.com/volunteer?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=budget_outreach&n=3)

Sincerely,

Christian Pancake
Chairman
Ohio College Republican Federation

[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=budget_outreach&n=4)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=budget_outreach&n=5)[](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=budget_outreach&n=6)
---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=budget_outreach&n=7). -=-=-

name: PA Polling Alert
subject: HUGE ratings change: "Leans Democratic"
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-72370834592759808/-1908095777377353728?refcode=e20160505.2&refcode2=e20160505.2nd&amount=25)
---
**_Cook Political Report_ : Pennsylvania moves from "Toss-Up" to
"Leans Democratic"
[Don't wait: Rush $5 to help take back the Senate for Democrats >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-72370834592759808/-1908095777377353728?refcode=e20160505.2&refcode2=e20160505.2nd&amount=25)** Friend -- HUGE ratings change!

**_Cook Political Report_ just upgraded Pennsylvania's presidential race from "Toss-Up" to "Leans Democratic"!**

With Donald Trump the presumptive GOP presidential nominee, Republicans up and down the ballot are more vulnerable than ever before. But this also means shady outside groups are going to spend even more than we were expecting to try to save Toomey's seat -- and without your help, we won't be able to fight back.

[**We can and will defeat Pat Toomey and take back the Senate for Democrats, but we need you. Rush an urgent donation to Katie now and flip Pennsylvania 's Senate seat to Democratic control!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-72370834592759808/-1908095777377353728?refcode=e20160505.2&refcode2=e20160505.2nd&amount=25)

Just days ago, _CNN_ also labeled Pennsylvania "Leans Democrat" for the presidential election. The wind is at our backs -- we need to keep this incredible momentum going.

[**Donate to Katie today and help Democrats win one of the country 's most competitive Senate races.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-72370834592759808/-1908095777377353728?refcode=e20160505.2&refcode2=e20160505.2nd&amount=25)

Thanks,

Team Katie
